subcodes.first_line: O thou Attar of mystic secrets, open wide thy fragrant musk-laden store, and perfume all horizons, that souls may be rendered sweetly scented by the wafting breaths of the Abhá Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار نافه اسرار بگشا و آفاقرا مشکبار نما تا مشامها از نفحات جنت ابهی معطر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @symbolism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
